activity_name.description: Activity type as shown on EA timetable (e.g. 'Swimming Sessions')

date.description: ISO date in Europe/London calendar day terms

start_time.description: If omitted, checks out the first matching activity on that date

max_price.description: Approved spend ceiling in PENCE. Capability-layer cap: requests above 5000 (£50) are rejected at request time, before the approval prompt. The executor independently re-enforces the £50 hard cap before paying.
